message:
fix(core): return SQLite-compatible sentinel for wal_checkpoint in non-WAL mode

When not in WAL mode, SQLite's PRAGMA wal_checkpoint does not error --
it returns (busy=0, log=-1, checkpointed=-1). Previously fsqlite
returned an error, causing parity mismatches in e2e differential tests.

Changes:
- connection.rs: return sentinel row (0, -1, -1) when journal_mode != WAL
  instead of propagating a pager error
- connection.rs: rename test to reflect new non-error behavior and assert
  the exact sentinel values
- connection.rs: reformat Row literal blocks for consistency (rustfmt)
- pager.rs: expose SimpleTransaction::is_writer() public accessor with
  #[must_use] annotation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
